mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM c_ai_region WHERE fg_active = '1') AS region_count, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM c_ai_org WHERE fg_active = '1') AS org_count, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM c_ai_device WHERE fg_active = '1') AS device_count, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM c_ai_config WHERE fg_active = '1') AS config_count, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM c_ai_symptom_template WHERE fg_active = '1') AS symptom_template_count, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM c_ai_op_log WHERE fg_active = '1') AS log_count, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM c_ai_user WHERE fg_active = '1') AS user_count, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM c_ai_role WHERE fg_active = '1') AS role_count FROM dual
